name: SEO Basics
description: The core set of SEO variables for any content pipeline — keyword, audience, word count, and tone. Add these to any pipeline that produces search-targeted content.

variables.label: Target Keyword
variables.hint: The primary search term you want to rank for

variables.label: Secondary Keywords
variables.exampleValue: team collaboration tools, task management apps
variables.hint: Comma-separated related keywords to weave in naturally

variables.label: Search Intent
variables.hint: Why people search this term — informational, commercial, navigational, or transactional

variables.label: Target Word Count
variables.hint: Target length in words — higher for competitive keywords

variables.label: Language
variables.hint: Language and locale for the output

name: Local SEO
description: Variables for location-targeted content — service area pages, local guides, and city-specific blog posts. Use these when you're targeting specific geographic markets.

variables.label: Business Name
variables.hint: Your business name as it should appear in the content

variables.label: City / Location
variables.hint: The primary geographic area you're targeting

variables.label: Service Area
variables.exampleValue: Austin, Round Rock, Cedar Park, and Pflugerville
variables.hint: Broader service area for secondary mentions

variables.label: Business Niche
variables.exampleValue: emergency plumbing and water heater installation
variables.hint: The specific service or product category

variables.label: Geo-Target Keyword
variables.hint: The location-specific search term to optimize for
